description: Generic per-material quality specification list. Required tests are defined per material_code. The validator must load these specs and compare each required parameter against COA test_results[]. Do not assume Assay is the only or universal required test.

spec_types.range: Numeric value must be within [spec_min, spec_max] inclusive.
spec_types.max: Numeric value must be less than or equal to spec_max.
spec_types.min: Numeric value must be greater than or equal to spec_min.
spec_types.text_equals: Text value must match expected_text (case-insensitive, trimmed).
spec_types.positive: Qualitative test where result must indicate a positive outcome (e.g., 'Positive', 'Conforms').
